seoTitle: Gundary vs Gunderbooka — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Gundary and Gunderbooka. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Gundary and Gunderbooka.
heading: Gundary vs Gunderbooka — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gundary, New South Wales and Gunderbooka, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gundary has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Gunderbooka (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gundary or Gunderbooka safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gundary has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Gunderbooka scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gundary scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Gunderbooka scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gundary or Gunderbooka?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gundary has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
